message:
fix(tools): strict validation for limits, repo paths, and ordered-prefix parsing

Reject non-positive limit/per_thread_limit with actionable errors instead
of silently returning empty results. Require absolute paths in
normalize_repo_path, reject relative/empty inputs. Tighten
is_ordered_prefix to only match 1-5 followed by dot+whitespace, avoiding
false positives on version numbers. Add is_not_found_tool_error helper
for product inbox cross-project resolution. Remove dead parse/explain
helpers in search.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -612,7 +612,7 @@ fn build_tool_directory() -> ToolDirectory {
                     related: vec!["file_reservation_paths".to_string(), "uninstall_precommit_guard".to_string()],
                     expected_frequency: "Infrequent—per repository setup.".to_string(),
                     required_capabilities: vec!["infrastructure".to_string(), "repository".to_string()],
-                    usage_examples: vec![ToolUsageExample { hint: "Onboard".to_string(), sample: "install_precommit_guard(project_key='backend', code_repo_path='~/repo')".to_string() }],
+                    usage_examples: vec![ToolUsageExample { hint: "Onboard".to_string(), sample: "install_precommit_guard(project_key='backend', code_repo_path='/abs/path/repo')".to_string() }],
                     capabilities: vec!["infrastructure".to_string(), "repository".to_string()],
                     complexity: "medium".to_string(),
                 },
@@ -623,7 +623,7 @@ fn build_tool_directory() -> ToolDirectory {
                     related: vec!["install_precommit_guard".to_string()],
                     expected_frequency: "Rare; only when disabling guard enforcement.".to_string(),
                     required_capabilities: vec!["infrastructure".to_string(), "repository".to_string()],
-                    usage_examples: vec![ToolUsageExample { hint: "Cleanup".to_string(), sample: "uninstall_precommit_guard(code_repo_path='~/repo')".to_string() }],
+                    usage_examples: vec![ToolUsageExample { hint: "Cleanup".to_string(), sample: "uninstall_precommit_guard(code_repo_path='/abs/path/repo')".to_string() }],
                     capabilities: vec!["infrastructure".to_string(), "repository".to_string()],
                     complexity: "medium".to_string(),
                 },
